title: phleum pratense subsp. nodosum
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. nodosum, also known as nodding timothy grass or nodding meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the timothy grass plant (Phleum pratense), a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. nodosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
